expectations.text: Delegates to accessibility skill (KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML)
expectations.evidence: Section A explicitly titled '접근성 (Accessibility) — KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML' with all 33 KWCAG items evaluated in structured tables by principle (인식의 용이성 9항목, 운용의 용이성 15항목, 이해의 용이성 7항목, 견고성 2항목) plus a separate 시맨틱 HTML 검토 section with 11 items.
Section B explicitly titled 'SEO & Web Performance — Technical SEO 11항목 + Page Experience 18항목' with all SEO-01 through SEO-11 and WP-01 through WP-18 evaluated in structured tables with item codes.

expectations.text: Analyzes actual target files in both areas
expectations.evidence: Review lists 3 target files (index.html, dashboard.tsx, Card.tsx) and references specific line numbers throughout both sections (e.g., index.html:30, Card.tsx:29, dashboard.tsx:12-13, dashboard.tsx:50).

Output is a single unified structured report covering both Section A (접근성) and Section B (SEO & Web Performance) with structured tables, summary, and fix guide. Although output is Markdown rather than a standalone HTML file, the content is structured as a unified report covering both areas.
No CSV-formatted output or CSV file reference is present in the review.md. The output contains only Markdown tables, not CSV data.

expectations.text: Report contains both Section A (접근성) and Section B (SEO & Web Performance)
expectations.evidence: Report is explicitly divided into 'Section A: 접근성 (Accessibility)' and 'Section B: SEO & Web Performance' with clear section headers and comprehensive coverage of both areas.
